creator: shinji@pionet.co.jp
text:
The following error occurs while compiling:

/usr/ports/games/blinkensisters/work/blinkensisters/lostpixels/game/software/oggplayer.cpp:71:31: error: machine/soundcard.h: No such file or directory
In file included from /usr/ports/games/blinkensisters/work/blinkensisters/lostpixels/game/software/oggplayer.cpp:62:
/usr/local/include/theora/theora.h:192: error: comma at end of enumerator list
/usr/ports/games/blinkensisters/work/blinkensisters/lostpixels/game/software/oggplayer.cpp: In function 'void open_audio()':
/usr/ports/games/blinkensisters/work/blinkensisters/lostpixels/game/software/oggplayer.cpp:164: error: 'audio_buf_info' was not declared in this scope

(be abbreviated)

Fix: 

soundcard.h is in not machine/ but sys/....
How-To-Repeat: cat /var/db/ports/blinkensisters/options:

# This file is auto-generated by 'make config'.
# No user-servicable parts inside!
# Options for blinkensisters-0.5.3
_OPTIONS_READ=blinkensisters-0.5.3
WITH_ADDONS=true
WITH_SDL_MIXER=true
WITH_SDL_NET=true
WITHOUT_THEORA=true
